title: Release Single-Job GoReleaser Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step implementation plan to replace the two-job git-cliff+GoReleaser release pipeline with a single GoReleaser-owned job.
notes: This is a task-by-task implementation plan (checkbox steps, verification commands, commit messages), not a pure narrative doc. It contains architectural rationale but defers the actual decision to the referenced design/spec doc; classified as DOC (execution playbook / supporting context) rather than SPEC since it describes a sequence of edits rather than a technical contract to be honored by the system.
